Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 155 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}I don't know how, but we made it out, all thanks to you, {f 4 1}.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 155 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}One wrong step, and Mitsuru would've had our heads.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Huh? Junpei-kun and Ryoji-kun are lying on the ground over there.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Their faces are all red. Are they okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I bet they were doing something stupid again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 6 155 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Looks like the heat got to them.[n]{f 1 1}
